mainEntity.name: Can part-time noise exposure trigger full hearing program in Centerville?
mainEntity.text: Can part-time noise exposure trigger full hearing program in Centerville?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, if 85 dB TWA over 8 hours equivalent; part-timers included based on exposure, not hours worked.

suggestedAnswer.text: Centerville intermittent workers qualify if dosimeter shows hazard. Programs scale to needs; claims prove exposure duration. Avoid carrier exclusions via records.[1]

name: Part-Time Workers in Utah Noise Programs
description: Yes, if 85 dB TWA over 8 hours equivalent; part-timers included based on exposure, not hours worked.
